languages.text: {n}Заканчивать рассказ вам не приходится. Спустя мгновение склонившиеся над пациентом специалисты одновременно поднимают инструменты вверх и бесцветный голос техножреца провозглашает: {/n} "Фиксирую полную стабилизацию состояния. Внутренние повреждения коры обработаны. Запрашиваю закрытие калотты и перевод пострадавшего на стимуляторы Б-класса".

{n}You do not need to finish the tale. A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments and, in a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the life form's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."
languages.original_text: {n}Заканчивать рассказ вам не приходится. Спустя мгновение склонившиеся над пациентом специалисты одновременно поднимают инструменты вверх и бесцветный голос техножреца провозглашает: {/n} "Фиксирую полную стабилизацию состояния. Внутренние повреждения коры обработаны. Запрашиваю закрытие калотты и перевод пострадавшего на стимуляторы Б-класса".

A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments and, in a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the unit's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."

A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments and, in a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the unit's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."

{n}You do not need to finish the tale. A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments and, in a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the unit's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."

languages.text: {n}Du musst die Geschichte nicht fertig erzählen. Einen Augenblick später heben die beiden über ihn gebeugten Personen gleichzeitig ihre Instrumente und der Techpriester erklärt mit ausdrucksloser Stimme:{/n} "Registriere die vollständige Stabilisierung des Zustandes der Einheit. Interner Kortikalschaden wurde behandelt. Erbitte Schließung der Kalotte und die Infusion von Klasse-B-Stimulanzien."
languages.original_text: {n}You do not need to finish the tale. A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments and, in a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the unit's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."

traits.locale_text: {n}Du musst die Geschichte nicht fertig erzählen. Einen Augenblick später heben die beiden über ihn gebeugten Personen gleichzeitig ihre Instrumente und der Techpriester erklärt mit ausdrucksloser Stimme:{/n} "Registriere die vollständige Stabilisierung des Zustandes der Einheit. Interner Kortikalschaden wurde behandelt. Erbitte Schließung der Kalotte und die Infusion von Klasse-B-Stimulanzien."

languages.text: {n} Vous n'avez pas le temps d'achever votre histoire. Un instant plus tard, les deux soignants penchés sur le patient lèvent simultanément leurs instruments. D'une voix monocorde, le technoprêtre déclare :{/n} « Confirmation de la stabilisation complète de l'état de l'entité. Les dégâts corticaux internes ont été traités. Demande de fermeture de la calotte et d'administration de stimulants de classe B à la victime. »
languages.original_text: {n}You do not need to finish the tale. A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments and, in a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the life form's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."

traits.locale_text: {n} Vous n'avez pas le temps d'achever votre histoire. Un instant plus tard, les deux soignants penchés sur le patient lèvent simultanément leurs instruments. D'une voix monocorde, le technoprêtre déclare :{/n} « Confirmation de la stabilisation complète de l'état de l'entité. Les dégâts corticaux internes ont été traités. Demande de fermeture de la calotte et d'administration de stimulants de classe B à la victime. »

languages.text: {n}你甚至不需要把故事讲完。片刻之后，俯身治疗病人的两人同时抬起了手中的仪器。技术神甫用毫无起伏的声音宣布，{/n}“记录到该生命体状况已完全稳定。脑内皮层损伤已处理。请求闭合颅顶并转入B级兴奋剂治疗。”
languages.original_text: {n}You do not need to finish the tale. A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments and, in a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the life form's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."

traits.locale_text: {n}你甚至不需要把故事讲完。片刻之后，俯身治疗病人的两人同时抬起了手中的仪器。技术神甫用毫无起伏的声音宣布，{/n}“记录到该生命体状况已完全稳定。脑内皮层损伤已处理。请求闭合颅顶并转入B级兴奋剂治疗。”

languages.text: {n}No necesitas terminar la historia. Un momento después, las dos personas que se inclinan sobre el paciente levantan su instrumental al mismo tiempo y, con voz neutra, el tecnosacerdote proclama:{/n} «Registrando la estabilización completa del estado de la forma de vida. El daño cortical interno está tratado. Solicitando el cierre del cráneo y el paso de la víctima a los estimulantes de clase B».
languages.original_text: {n}You do not need to finish the tale. A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments and, in a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the life form's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."

traits.locale_text: {n}No necesitas terminar la historia. Un momento después, las dos personas que se inclinan sobre el paciente levantan su instrumental al mismo tiempo y, con voz neutra, el tecnosacerdote proclama:{/n} «Registrando la estabilización completa del estado de la forma de vida. El daño cortical interno está tratado. Solicitando el cierre del cráneo y el paso de la víctima a los estimulantes de clase B».

languages.text: {n}最後まで話す必要はない。しばらくして、患者の上にもたれかかった専門医たちが同時に器具を上に掲げ、テクノジュレッツの無色の声が宣言する： {/n} 「安定化完了。皮質内部の損傷は治療済みです。カロットの閉鎖とB級刺激装置への移乗を要請する」。
languages.original_text: {n}You don't have to finish the story. Moments later, the specialists leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments upwards and the colourless voice of the technojuretz proclaims: {/n} "Stabilising condition complete. Internal cortical damage treated. Request closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulators".

languages.text: {n}Hikâyeyi bitirmene gerek kalmıyor. Bir an sonra hastanın üzerine eğilen iki kişi, aynı anda aletlerini kaldırıyor. Tekno Rahip, renksiz bir sesle konuşuyor.{/n} "Yaşam formunun durumunun tamamen stabilize olduğunu kaydediyorum. İç zihinsel hasarı giderildi. Kafatasının üst bölümünün kapatılmasını ve kurbanın B sınıfı uyarıcıların naklini talep ediyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}You do not need to finish the tale. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."
